arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s possible line-up vs Dortmund: Rodrygo or Modric, Tchouaméni or Camavinga?
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti appears to have two chief selection doubts ahead of Los Blancos’ Champions League clash with Borussia Dortmund today . Courtois; Vázquez, Militão, Rüdiger, Mendy; Camavinga/Tchouaméni, Valverde, Bellingham; Rodrygo/Modric, Vinicius and Mbappé .

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe sent clear Real Madrid demand as Jude Bellingham issue addressed
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti has been forced to defend star players Kylian Mbappe and Jude Bellingham ahead of his side's meeting with Borussia Dortmund in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Tuesday's Champions League predictions including Real Madrid vs. Dortmund
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Champions League fixtures, including Real Madrid vs. Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham brutally slammed by Spanish media amid Real Madrid struggles
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham is yet to score for Real Madrid this season and the England star has been criticised for his latest display as Carlo Ancelotti's men laboured to a 2-1 win away to Celta Vigo

arts.ttl: Zinedine Zidane ignores Cristiano Ronaldo when naming favourite Real Madrid players
arts.sum: Ronaldo, who spent nine years at the Bernabeu following his 2009 world record transfer, had gone by the time Zidane returned. "When you see [Toni] Kroos, [Luka] Modric and [Karim] Benzema playing for you for an hour without losing a single ball, that is football," Zidane told Canal+ .

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Borussia Dortmund: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: There's a repeat of the 2024 Champions League final to enjoy on Tuesday night as 15-time European champions Real Madrid welcome Borussia Dortmund to the Spanish capital. Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Borussia Dortmund (4-3-3) : Courtois; Vazquez, Rudiger, Militao, Mendy; Tchouameni, Valverde, Bellingham; Rodrygo, Mbappe, Vinicius.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: CB: Antonio Rudiger - The Madrid mainstay was excellent in last season's Champions League final, but he'll have a different assignment on Tuesday with Serhou Guirassy, who joined Dortmund in the summer, heading into this contest in excellent goalscoring form. ST: Kylian Mbappe - Mbappe's productive start to the season continue with an excellent goal at the weekend and there's no doubt he'll be included in the XI on Tuesday after missing Madrid's defeat to Lille.

arts.ttl: Paulo Bernardo insists Celtic have Dortmund shock out of their system and he's ready to rock for Atalanta
arts.sum: The Portuguese insists they can apply the lessons learned in Dortmund destruction to the game in Bergamo

arts.ttl: The all-time record Real Madrid could match against Barcelona in El Clasico
arts.sum: A narrow 2-1 win over Celta Vigo on Saturday night stretched Madrid's unbeaten record to 42 league games - one short of the record that Barcelona set between 2017 and 2018. Real Madrid are one game away from equalling La Liga's all-time record for consecutive unbeaten matches.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star returns to group training before Barcelona showdown
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid were on Monday afforded a timely boost on the personnel front. This comes amid confirmation that Brahim Díaz has rejoined group training alongside the rest…
